title: ellipeia ferruginea
intro: Ellipeia ferruginea is a plant species native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India, scientifically classified under the family Sapindaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ellipeia ferruginea include its potential to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress. The herbal preparations of Ellipeia ferruginea include extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
